query_url: https://catalogue.dataspace.copernicus.eu/odata/v1/Products?$filter=(Collection/Name eq 'SENTINEL-2') and Attributes/OData.CSC.StringAttribute/any(att:att/Name eq 'platformSerialIdentifier' and att/OData.CSC.StringAttribute/Value eq 'A') and Attributes/OData.CSC.StringAttribute/any(att:att/Name eq 'operationalMode' and att/OData.CSC.StringAttribute/Value eq 'INS-RAW')&$orderby=ContentDate/Start asc&$top=1000&$expand=Attributes&$count=true
